Type Property# willLaunchApplication

macOS 26.0+

```
static var willLaunchApplication: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSWorkspace.WillLaunchApplicationMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<NSWorkspace.WillLaunchApplicationMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/willlaunchapplication#see-also)
